description: Create server-side API routes for Neighborhood Explorer: /api/neighborhood/explore and /api/neighborhood/geocode. Add GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY to .env.local.
steps: Add GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY=AIzaSyC1D9UDugepwhtlCW1C5pkQ_HtFoEzH_K0 to /projects/sandbox/cost-smart/.env.local (on a new line after the existing GOOGLE_SOLAR_API_KEY)

Create app/api/neighborhood/explore/route.ts following the exact rate-limiting pattern from app/api/solar/insights/route.ts (in-memory Map, getClientIp, checkRateLimit, incrementRateLimit). Rate limits: FREE_LIMIT=2, PRO_LIMIT=30 per day.

The /api/neighborhood/explore route accepts POST with { latitude, longitude, isPro, email }. Validate lat/lng same as solar route. Verify Pro status server-side using getSubscriptionByEmail from lib/kv-store.ts.

Call Google Places API (New) Text Search endpoint to find nearby places in 5 categories: schools (within 2km), hospitals/clinics (within 3km), parks/recreation (within 2km), transit stations (within 1.5km), grocery/shopping (within 1.5km). Use the Text Search (New) endpoint: POST https://places.googleapis.com/v1/places:searchText with headers X-Goog-Api-Key and X-Goog-FieldMask.

For free tier response: return top 3 per category with name and approximate distance only. For Pro tier: return full list (up to 5 per category) with name, rating, userRatingCount, formattedAddress, and distance.

Calculate a 'Neighborhood Score' (0-100) based on: presence and proximity of amenities across all categories. Formula: each category contributes up to 20 points. Within each category, score based on count of results and their average distance (closer = higher score).

Create app/api/neighborhood/geocode/route.ts - accepts POST with { address, isPro, email }. Rate limit: 5/day free, 50/day Pro. Calls Google Geocoding API: GET https://maps.googleapis.com/maps/api/geocode/json?address=ENCODED_ADDRESS&key=API_KEY. Returns { latitude, longitude, formattedAddress }.

Both routes should return proper error responses (400 for validation, 429 for rate limit with Retry-After header, 500 for config errors, 502 for upstream failures). Only increment rate limit counter after successful upstream response.
acceptance_criteria: app/api/neighborhood/explore/route.ts exists and exports POST handler
app/api/neighborhood/geocode/route.ts exists and exports POST handler
Rate limiting logic matches the pattern in app/api/solar/insights/route.ts
Pro verification uses getSubscriptionByEmail from lib/kv-store.ts
Free tier returns limited data (top 3 per category, names only), Pro tier returns full data
Neighborhood Score calculation is included in the explore response
npx tsc --noEmit passes without type errors
verification: Run npx tsc --noEmit to confirm no type errors
Run npm run build to confirm the build succeeds
findings: Both routes built and type-checked successfully. .env.local updated with GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY and NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY. The chart width/height warnings in build output are pre-existing from recharts components, not related to this feature.
